# WizeMoney

> Free, private personal-finance dashboard. Track income, expenses, bank accounts, credit cards, stocks, pension and tax in one place. Local-first (data stays in your browser) and available in English, Hebrew, Portuguese and Spanish.

## What it does

- Income, expenses, bank accounts, credit cards, subscriptions and loans tracking
- Stock portfolio with analytics, alerts and fund-fee comparison
- Savings simulator, loan amortization, pension and tax optimizers
- AI money assistant and family/multi-profile dashboards
- Cloud backup so data follows you across devices when signed in

## Part of WizeLife

- [WizeLife suite](https://wizelife.ai/): five free AI tools for money, tax, real-estate, health and travel.

## Notes

- Privacy: local-first; data is only synced to your own account when signed in.
- Free tier on every feature; Pro ($4.99/mo) and YOLO ($9.99/mo) raise AI limits and unlock advanced tools.
